rationale: The citing paper appears to reference Sethuraman et al. (2011) only once, in a grouped citation with Assmus et al. (1984), to note that its estimated advertising elasticities are broadly in line with prior literature. The cited work is used as a benchmark/background reference for plausibility rather than as a basis for model development, hypotheses, measurement, or identification strategy. No distinct mechanism, method, or theoretical argument from Sethuraman et al. is developed in the citing paper.
